questionHtml:
Three statements about Boltzmann’s constant kB are:

I.   kB has a unit of J K−1

II.  kB =gas constantAvogadro's constant

III. kB =the average kinetic energy of particlestemperature of the gas

Which statements are correct?


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III
